prompt_text:
### Demographics: 73-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 16 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 2 (60-89)
Simple Steatosis
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Diabetic Foot Ulcer / High-Risk Foot
Major Depressive Disorder
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
Thyroid nodule (status post lobectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 2 (60-89); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Simple Steatosis; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Current smoker (10 cigarettes/day for 15 years; ~7.5 pack-years); Alcohol 3-4 drinks/week (2-3 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Sitagliptin 100mg once daily; Olanzapine (10 mg nightly), Duloxetine (60 mg daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Amlodipine (5 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 75.6 kg; Height 156.2 cm; BMI 31.0 kg/m²; Blood pressure 133/82 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.0%; 9 months ago 8.3%; 6 months ago 8.8%; 3 months ago 9.3%; current 9.5%), FPG (12 months ago 203mg/dL; 9 months ago 191mg/dL; 6 months ago 245mg/dL; 3 months ago 198mg/dL; current 204mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 74.9kg; 9 months ago 72.1kg; 6 months ago 73.9kg; 3 months ago 71.8kg; current 75.6kg), Height (12 months ago 156.2cm; 9 months ago 156.2cm; 6 months ago 156.2cm; 3 months ago 156.2cm; current 156.2cm), BMI (12 months ago 31.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 30.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 31.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 30.0kg/m²; current 31.0kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 134mmHg; 9 months ago 132mmHg; 6 months ago 130mmHg; 3 months ago 130mmHg; current 133mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 83mmHg; 9 months ago 85mmHg; 6 months ago 83mmHg; 3 months ago 82mmHg; current 82mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 62U/L; 9 months ago 70U/L; 6 months ago 60U/L; 3 months ago 63U/L; current 65U/L), AST (12 months ago 45U/L; 9 months ago 36U/L; 6 months ago 36U/L; 3 months ago 36U/L; current 40U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.4mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.4mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.4mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.3mg/dL; current 1.3mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 76mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 75mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 76mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 78mL/min/1.73m²; current 76mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 102mg/g; 9 months ago 76mg/g; 6 months ago 102mg/g; 3 months ago 78mg/g; current 88mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 96mg/dL; 9 months ago 102mg/dL; 6 months ago 96mg/dL; 3 months ago 96mg/dL; current 98mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 46mg/dL; 9 months ago 45mg/dL; 6 months ago 49mg/dL; 3 months ago 49mg/dL; current 47mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 174mg/dL; 9 months ago 155mg/dL; 6 months ago 156mg/dL; 3 months ago 174mg/dL; current 167mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.3g/dL; 9 months ago 11.6g/dL; 6 months ago 12.2g/dL; 3 months ago 12.3g/dL; current 11.7g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Very poor adherence (estimated <50%); SMBG rarely performed; lifestyle control severely limited.
Financial context: Patient has limited financial resources and prefers low-cost options (budget ≤ KRW 200,000/month).
